name: showMentorQuestion
description: Legacy generic question card. Prefer showTrueFalseQuestion or showExplanationQuestion. If used, the question must be a standalone transferable concept answerable without seeing or remembering a concrete code example. Never name or point to the example or its implementation details.

parameters.description: Only the exact standalone conceptual question. No concrete-example references, identifiers, implementation details, setup, hint, or answer.
